## Checklist

- [ ] `bash tests/smoke_test.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated a test for new behavior
- [ ] Updated the README / CHANGELOG if behavior changed
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (stdlib `python3` + shell only)
- [ ] Hook scripts still never raise into the user's session (exit 0 on error)
